## New Package Declaration

### Package Name

<!-- The name of the package (e.g., cl-ppcre, alexandria) -->


### Original URL

<!-- URL of the original library repository or documentation -->


### Original License

<!-- The license of the original library (e.g., MIT, BSD, LLGPL) -->


### Checklist

- [ ] Declaration file is placed under `packages/<package-name>/`
- [ ] File is named `<package-name>.d.tycl`
- [ ] File header includes package name, original URL, original license, and your name
- [ ] `(in-package #:<package-name>)` is declared at the top
- [ ] Type annotations follow TyCL conventions
